ValidationRule.description: Unit Testing must be completed (and all dev tasks Completed) before moving to Dev Completed
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Dev Completed"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Unit_Testing_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unit Testing must be completed and all Tasks marked Completed before moving to "Dev Completed". Please close the Unit Testing Activity Task or tick "Unit Testing Complete" first.
